value.stringValue: Site has been created successfully. However, an error has occurred while emailing branch. Please notify them manually.
Request rejected but error occurred while notifying branch. Please inform them separately.
ACTION REQUIRED - New National Account Site Request Submitted

Flow.description: PT1-1343 Updated wording in branch email
Flow.label: National Account New Site Approval

recordLookups.name: Get_National_Account_Permission_Set_ID
recordLookups.label: Get National Account Permission Set ID

fields.name: Error_1
fields.fieldText:
An error has occurred while creating site or related contact or competency condition...

{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: Let_branch_know_why_it_s_rejected
fields.fieldText: Let the requester know why this has been rejected:

textTemplates.name: Email_Body
textTemplates.text:
Your national account site request for "{!Get_Staging.Site_Name__c}" has been approved. Click on the link below to navigate to the new site.

https://blue-arrow.lightning.force.com/{!Create_Site}

ACTION: Now you need to check on the knowledge library NA page whether this client uses the client portal for hours approvals and if so, link your contact(s) to your site and set them up as a portal user.

textTemplates.name: Reject_Email_Body
textTemplates.text:
Your recent request for the following national account site has been rejected. Please see details below.

Site: {!Get_Staging.Site_Name__c}

Rejection Reason: {!Let_branch_know_why_it_s_rejected}

Click on the link below to view more details and resubmit your request.

https://blue-arrow.lightning.force.com/{!recordID}

textTemplates.name: Submission_Email_Body
textTemplates.text:
New national account site request resubmitted.

Site: {!Get_Staging.Site_Name__c}

Click on the link below to review and action the request.

https://blue-arrow.lightning.force.com/{!recordID}{!recordID}

value.stringValue: National Account Site Request Rejected (Request ID {!Get_Staging.Request_ID__c})
